title: Pentest Report Structure Template
when_to_use: When compiling the final pentest deliverable

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Create professional cover page with company branding and engagement dates
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for pentest report structure template
steps.expected_output: Formatted cover page with client name, pentest dates, and tester information

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Write concise executive summary (1 page) with key findings and risk overview
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: High-level summary suitable for non-technical stakeholders

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Document scope definition, engagement rules, and testing methodology
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Detailed scope section explaining what was tested and how

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Create summary table of all findings with severity ratings and status
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Quick-reference table enabling rapid finding review

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Write detailed finding sections following consistent template for each vulnerability
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive finding documentation with technical details

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Develop risk matrix graphically showing severity vs likelihood
steps.expected_output: Visual risk representation for executive communication

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Provide detailed remediation roadmap with timelines and responsible parties
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Actionable remediation plan with prioritization and timelines

steps.title: Step 8
steps.instruction: Include appendices with tool output, testing timeline, and methodology details
steps.tip: Follow standard best practices for step 8
steps.expected_output: Supporting documentation validating testing rigor and thoroughness
